## Artifacts Generated by red-hot_rebis Tools

### 1. Gene Imscriber вҖ” 7-Gene Edit Analysis
- `gene_imscriber_results.json` вҖ” Full B4 lattice analysis for all 7 human target gene edits
- 7 genes: COL1A2 (reflectin), OPN4 (opsin), CHRNA7 (nAChR motor), ACTB (papilla), NEUROD1 (neurogenesis), CHR2 (optogenetic), VEGFA (vasculature)

### 2. Serpentrod вҖ” 5 Cephalopod Protein Analyses
- `serpentrod_results.json` вҖ” Processing predictions + cleavage site maps
- `fasta/REFLECTIN_A1.fasta` вҖ” 428 aa, Euprymna scolopes
- `fasta/CEPHALOPOD_OPSIN.fasta` вҖ” 353 aa, Octopus bimaculoides
- `fasta/nAChR_ALPHA7_MOTOR.fasta` вҖ” 403 aa, Sepia officinalis
- `fasta/PAPILLIN_HYDROSTAT.fasta` вҖ” 232 aa, Octopus vulgaris
- `fasta/NEUROGENIN_OCTOPUS.fasta` вҖ” 228 aa, Octopus bimaculoides

### 3. CH3MPILER вҖ” 7 Compound IUPAC/CAS Analyses
- `ch3mpiler_results.json` вҖ” CAS resolution + IG type analysis
- Resolved: 11-cis-retinal (C20H28O), acetylcholine (C7H16NO2+), dopachrome (C9H7NO4)
- Macromolecular: reflectin A1, silk fibroin hydrogel, channelrhodopsin-2, VEGF-A165

### 4. Protein Structure вҖ” 6 PDB Backbone Models

- `pdb/CEPHALOPOD_OPSIN.pdb` вҖ” 92,993 B, 236 residues

- `pdb/NEUROGENIN_OCTOPUS.pdb` вҖ” 39,198 B, 116 residues
- `pdb/VEGF165_HUMAN.pdb` вҖ” 75,713 B, 191 residues

### 5. CLINK Actionable Organism Package (L0вҖ“L8)
- `actionable_organism/L0/` вҖ” Hadron spectrum, QCD coupling (subatomic)
- `actionable_organism/L1/` вҖ” B4 nucleotide lattice, electron configurations (orbital)
- `actionable_organism/L2/` вҖ” Atomic parameters, isotopes (atom)

- `actionable_organism/L4/` вҖ” Protein FASTA, PDB coordinates, secondary structure, serpentrod classification (cell)
- `actionable_organism/L5/` вҖ” Plasmid GenBank (.gb), SBOL construct (.sbol), codon usage, genome FASTA/GFF, metabolic model (mitosis)
- `actionable_organism/L6/` вҖ” Cell cycle parameters, mitosis assay protocol (meiosis)
- `actionable_organism/L7/` вҖ” Cell type ratios, ECM composition, growth factors, organoid protocol, scaffold parameters (tissue/organ)
- `actionable_organism/L8/` вҖ” Whole organism layer (ground-up CLINK design manifest)

### 6. CLINK Ground-Up Design
- `clink_design_ground_up.json` вҖ” Full L0вҶ’L8 synthesis path: 23.3188 total distance, 36 promotions

## Reflectin Spectrum

Reflectin A1 is ОҰ-dominant (Parity, 77.1% of activated primitives). The tandem (GRY)n repeats interspersed with (GHY)n nodes create a photonic bandgap via the aromatic residues Tyr/Trp вҖ” exactly the structural basis for cephalopod iridescence.
